remarks.zh: 用于窗户制造的多行输出示例。根据需要调整偏移。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Example of multi-line output for window fabrication. Adjust offsets as needed.
remarks.ms: Contoh output berbilang baris untuk pembuatan tingkap. Laraskan offset jika perlu. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Contoh keluaran multi-baris untuk pembuatan jendela. Sesuaikan offset jika diperlukan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: ตัวอย่างผลลัพธ์หลายบรรทัดสำหรับการผลิตหน้าต่าง ปรับค่าออฟเซ็ตตามความจำเป็น (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Ví dụ về đầu ra nhiều dòng cho việc sản xuất cửa sổ. Điều chỉnh độ lệch nếu cần. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Halimbawa ng multi-line na output para sa paggawa ng bintana. Ayusin ang mga offset kung kinakailangan. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: ပေါ်စက်ပစ္စည်းများ ထုပ်လုပ်ရေးအတွက် စနစ်ချက်စီတွင် ထုတ်ကုန်အများအပြား၏ ။ လိုအပ်ဖြစ်ပါက ပယ်ဖျက်ရန်ညှိနိုင်း လုပ်ပါ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: ឧទាហរណ៍នៃលទ្ធផលច្រើនបន្ទាត់សម្រាប់ការផលិតបង្អួច។ កែប្រែការធ្វើឱ្យវាកាន់តែច្បាស់ប្រសិនបើចាំបាច់។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຕົວຢ່າງนำທີ່ໃຊ້ທີ່ຊອດເສັ້ນຂ້າມສາລັດໃນປ່າສະຖານໃສ່ແຜນທີ່ສີ່ເອນ (AI translated, please check)
